hook: Stoicism teaches control over your thoughts, not your sleep—freeing you from the anxiety that keeps you awake
title: Marcus Aurelius on Anxiety and Rest | Stoic Philosophy to Fall Asleep To
alternatives: Let Go of Control: Stoic Wisdom to Sleep By
The Stoic Path to Peace: Marcus Aurelius and Restful Sleep
Meditations for Sleep: Marcus Aurelius on Releasing Worry
Amor Fati: Accept What Is and Sleep Peacefully
description: If you're lying awake worrying about sleep, Marcus Aurelius has a powerful answer: you can't control sleep itself, only your response to it. In this episode, we explore Stoic philosophy's wisdom on releasing anxiety and finding peace through acceptance. Let his Meditations guide you toward the mental calm that naturally invites rest. The path to sleep isn't through forcing—it's through letting go.
